confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete the assignment {{title}}?
advance_status_message: Are you sure you want to advance the assignment status from '{{current}}' to '{{next}}'? This will also update the status of all associated submissions.
copy_previous_message: This will copy all assignments from the previous period. Please verify that commissions and students for this period are fully loaded, as this will automatically generate submission records for each student. Do you want to continue?
warning_alert: Creating or copying assignments will automatically generate submission sheets for all students enrolled in this period.
